title: SolarEdge Stock Earnings: SolarEdge Technologies Misses EPS, Beats Revenue for Q1 2024
text: SolarEdge Technologies (SEDG) Q1 2024 Earnings Results. Key Metrics: EPS: -1.90 (missed analyst estimate of -1.57). Revenue: 204.40 million (beat analyst estimate of 194.67 million by 5%). Performance Summary: SolarEdge delivered mixed results in the first quarter of 2024. While the company exceeded revenue expectations, it fell short on profitability metrics. The earnings report shows that SolarEdge Technologies reported earnings per share of -1.90, underperforming projections. However, on the revenue side, the company demonstrated stronger performance, as revenue of 204.40 million surpassed analyst forecasts. Analysis: The 5% revenue beat suggests solid operational execution in generating sales, though the company continued to face profitability challenges, with losses exceeding analyst expectations.
